title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter for Ollama; drop local LLMs into chains, agents, RAG pipelines with one line.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, multi-user, admin panel) installable via Docker.

title: continue
summary: VS Code & JetBrains plugin that adds local AI coding assistant via Ollama; autocomplete, /edit, /chat.

title: lobe-chat
summary: Modern open-source chat UI (Next.js) with Ollama provider, plugins, vision, TTS, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, async, model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST endpoints; chat, generate, pull, delete, list, copy, show.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI chat tool with history, prompt templates, and shell integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Proxy that makes Ollama speak GitHub Copilot API so you can use local models inside GitHub.dev or VS Code.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Curated list of 150+ community-uploaded GGUF models ready to `ollama pull`.

title: ollama-chem
summary: Chemistry-aware Modelfile templates and tools for Ollama (PubChem tools, SMILES support).

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in threads; slash commands, multi-model, code blocks.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app bringing Ollama models into channels/DMs with streaming replies and thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) plus docker-compose examples with WebUI, volume mounts, and GPU flags.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and module for Ollama; declarative model cache, systemd service, CUDA support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger pipeline example that spins up Ollama container, pulls a model, and runs integration tests.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration; use Ollama models as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.
